problem id: e099a43a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(2) AND NOT SHR(4)) XOR NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  11011001 -> 10111101
  00110111 -> 11000011
  10110111 -> 11001011
  01010001 -> 10011111
  00011111 -> 01100011
  10001000 -> 11011101
  11000101 -> 01001100
  10000011 -> 10011001

query: 11100000
predicted answer: 01111110
